response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: The audio consists of introductory dialogue; no vocal music is present in this segment, which matches the scene description in the Reference JSON. Spoken Japanese phonetically matches the transcribed dialogue. On-screen text at 00:35 confirms the spelling of '魔法少女 ホロウィッチ！' (Magical Girl Holowitches!). All timestamps are tightly synchronized with vocal starts and ends, with splits applied to account for mid-sentence pauses.

subtitles.original: 僕たちは配信アプリ ホロキャスで活動する配信者
subtitles.english: We're streamers who are active on a streaming app called HoloCast.

subtitles.original: 突然画面に吸い込まれて アプリとつながる謎の世界 ホロキャス界に来ちゃった
subtitles.english: Suddenly sucked into the screen, we ended up in the mysterious HoloCast world connected to the app.

subtitles.original: そこでは 現実で苦しむ人の魂が怪物化してしまう現象 夢落ちが起こっていた
subtitles.english: There, a phenomenon called 'Dreamfall' was turning the souls of suffering people into monsters.

subtitles.original: 怪物コラプサーを倒して みんなの魂を取り戻さないと
subtitles.english: We have to defeat the monster Corruptors and get everyone's souls back!

subtitles.original: そうして 魔法少女に変身して 戦うことになった
subtitles.english: And so, we transformed into magical girls and fought.

subtitles.original: みんなの心を助けて 夢を応援する
subtitles.english: We'll save everyone's hearts and support their dreams.

subtitles.original: それが 魔法少女ホロウィッチ！
subtitles.english: That's who we are: Magical Girl Holowitches!

subtitles.original: 今日はスペシャルハロウィンステージ！
subtitles.english: Today is the Special Halloween Stage!

subtitles.original: ホロキャスの人気配信者が多数出演
subtitles.english: Many popular HoloCast streamers will be performing.

subtitles.original: さらに 今をときめく超人気歌手の叶夢さんも参加 超超豪華イベント
subtitles.english: Even the super-popular singer Kaname is joining this super-extravagant event!

subtitles.original: で その超豪華イベントのオープニングアクトをウチら6人が担当することになって
subtitles.english: And the six of us were chosen to be the opening act for that super-event.

subtitles.original: せっかくだし みんなでホロウィッチの衣装を着て ドカンと派手に盛り上げちゃおうかなって
subtitles.english: I thought we'd all wear our Holowitches costumes and really liven things up!

subtitles.original: でもいいのかな？ 魔法とか 妖精とか 一応内緒なんだけど
subtitles.english: But is it okay? Magic and fairies and all... it's supposed to be a secret.

subtitles.original: 今日はハロウィンだから 仮装ってことにすれば なんとかなるなる！
subtitles.english: Since it's Halloween, if we just call them costumes, it'll be fine!

subtitles.original: そうそう ってそろそろ準備したほうがよくない？
subtitles.english: Exactly. Anyway, shouldn't we start getting ready?

subtitles.original: そうだね！ じゃ 気合入れていきますか！
subtitles.english: You're right! Let's get fired up!
